title: frame a useful StudyPack task
prompt: Сделайте рамку задачи: сделать StudyPack по французскому полезным.
reveal:
Expected parts:
- signal
- in_scope
- out_of_scope
- observable_done
Diagnostic signals:
- strong_fit: names practical service communication as goal; excludes full French course; defines done as behavior, not count of cards
- common_misconception: optimizes number of flash cards

title: detect metric-goal substitution
prompt: Пользователь сделал 200 карточек, но не может записаться на стрижку. Где сбой?
reveal:
Diagnostic signals:
- strong_fit: says card count became hidden goal; proposes behavioral check
- partial: says cards were bad without naming metric substitution

title: write compact decision memory
prompt: Запишите решение по File Transfer: что выбрали, какой инвариант, что проверить потом.
reveal:
Expected parts:
- chosen_option
- security_invariant
- follow_up_checks
Diagnostic signals:
- strong_fit: token-gated explicit mode; no read/write without valid token; mentions TTL/logging/untrusted network checks
- under_specified: says secure it without an invariant

title: keep rival explanations during debugging
prompt: После EPUB file browser показал 0 файлов при mounted SD. Дайте 2 причины и дешевую проверку.
reveal:
Diagnostic signals:
- strong_fit: gives at least two plausible rivals; gives cheap observation for each
- common_misconception: asserts one cause without test
